Description: A painting of the Cthonic Horns based off notes compiled from your sightseeing log.
A painting of the Chthonic Horns based off notes compiled from your sightseeing log.
Name: Cthonic Horns Painting
Chthonic Horns Painting

Description: This advanced magitek contraption displays a harrowing battle with the dread Guardian Arkveld.
Name: Guardian Arkveld's Windward Plains Phasmascape

Description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the wide, sweeping landscape of the Windward Plains.
Name: Rey Dau's Windward Plains Phasmascape

Description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the tumultuous waters and woods of Uth Duna's Scarlet Forest.
Name: Uth Duna's Scarlet Forest Phasmascape

Description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the ultimate weapon, Omega, atop the Iceshard Cliffs.
Name: Omega's Iceshard Cliffs Phasmascape

Description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the serpentine menace, Jin Dahaad, atop the Iceshard Cliffs.
Name: Jin Dahaad's Iceshard Cliffs Phasmascape

Description: This advanced magitek contraption displays the six-limbed terror, Nu Udra, in the sweltering heat of the Oilwell Basin.
Name: Nu Udra's Oilwell Basin Phasmascape

Description: A solemn stone lantern similar to those found flanking the steps of the Breathless Altar at Zirgorteh the Open-armed.
Name: Yok Huy Lantern

Description: A portable grill used by hunters to cook raw meat and other ingredients.
Name: Outdoor Hunter's Grill

Description: A simple weapon stand bearing a crude but surprisingly powerful blade.
Name: Wilds Great Sword Stand

Description: A banner said to be adored by hunters of another world.
Name: Wilds Banner

Description: A pendant lamp inspired by tales of hunters from another world.
Name: Wilds Pendant Lamp

Description: A hastily assembled camp for the hunter who cares little and less for comfort.
Name: Makeshift Camp

Description: A pop-up facility used by hunters on the go to quickly change equipment.
Name: Pop-up Camp

Description:
A striking dummy designed to resemble a stalwart Felyne friend.

※Up to three dummies may be placed in a single estate, regardless of type.
Name: Palanx Striking Dummy

Description: An iridescent, intricately detailed wall ornament modeled after the windows that adorn the twinkling edifice of Lyhe Ghiah.
Name: Lyhe Ghiah Stained Crystal Ornament

Description: Crafted to resemble the clocktower awaiting adventurers who tread the furthest reaches of Pilgrim's Traverse, this timepiece makes an imposing, somewhat hypnotic addition to any garden.
Name: Traverse Clocktower

Description: Native to the environs of Pilgrim's Traverse, this bulbous arboreal bloom casts an otherworldly glow.
Name: Traverse Tree

Description: A masterfully rendered oil depiction of legendary Ivalician figures from a tumultuous age.
Name: Legends of Ivalice

Description: A fragment of aetherpool gear found in Pilgrim's Traverse.
Name: Illumed Aetherpool Glass

Description: An ancient tome found in Pilgrim's Traverse.
Name: Illumed Invocations

Singular: sack of Warmth repair supply materials
Plural: sacks of Warmth repair supply materials
Description:
A sack of materials required to craft supplies which will be used to repair the living quarters in Zirgorteh the Open-armed.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Warmth Repair Supply Materials

Description:
A set of supplies required to make the living quarters in Zirgorteh the Open-armed cozy and warm.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Warmth Repair Supplies

Singular: sack of master mason's tool materials
Plural: sacks of master mason's tool materials
Description:
A sack of materials required to create a set of high-quality stonemasonry tools.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Master Mason's Tool Materials

Description:
A set of mason's tools worthy of the deftest hand.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Master Mason's Tools

Singular: sack of ice removal tool materials
Plural: sacks of ice removal tool materials
Description:
A sack of materials required to craft enough ice removal tools for every pair of Yok Huy hands.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Ice Removal Tool Materials

Description:
A set of tools and materials required for the delicate removal of stubbornly frozen ice.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Ice Removal Tools

Singular: sack of conductive golem component materials
Plural: sacks of conductive golem component materials
Description:
A sack of materials required to craft components used to conduct aether throughout the stone frame of a golem.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Conductive Golem Component Materials

Description:
A set of components required to get aether flowing through a golem's stone body, blessing it with locomotion.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Conductive Golem Components

Singular: sack of living sepulchre supply materials
Plural: sacks of living sepulchre supply materials
Description:
A sack of materials required to craft supplies to help put the finishing touches on the living sepulchre devoted to the snow spirits.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Living Sepulchre Supply Materials

Description:
A set of magically imbued tools and supplies required to help the snow spirits understand the meaning of the living sepulchre dedicated to them.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Living Sepulchre Supplies

Singular: set of snow removal tool materials
Plural: sets of snow removal tool materials
Description:
A set of materials required to craft snow removal tools.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Snow Removal Tool Materials

Description:
A tool required for the never-ending task of snow removal at Zirgorteh the Open-armed.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Snow Removal Tool

Description:
A set of materials required to craft traditional Yok Huy cart components.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Cart Component Materials

Description:
A hard-wearing component used in the construction of traditional Yok Huy carts.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Cart Component

Plural: sets of home exterior component materials
Description:
A set of materials required to craft components for decorating homes in the Eorzean fashion.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Home Exterior Component Materials

Description:
A component for decorating homes in the Eorzean fashion.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Home Exterior Component

Plural: sets of hand warmer component parts
Description:
A set of materials required to craft hand warmer components.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

Description:
A set of exchangeable parts used for the upkeep of Yok Huy hand warmers.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Hand Warmer Components

Description:
A set of materials required to craft daily necessities for those residing at Warmth.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Warmth Necessity Components

Description:
A collection of invaluable goods often utilized by the Yok Huy workers at Warmth.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Warmth Necessities

Description:
A set of materials required to craft a warm-yet-comfortable traveling outfit.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Visitor's Winterwear Components

Description:
A multilayered, size-adjustable set of coldproof clothing.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Visitor's Winterwear

Singular: set of Yok Huy handicraft materials
Plural: sets of Yok Huy handicraft materials
Description:
A set of materials required for the creation of traditional Yok Huy handicrafts.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

A bundle of Yok Huy handicrafts, currently a favorite of Pelupelu merchants.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

Description:
A set of materials required to craft replacement tools for stonemasons both seasoned and inexperienced.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Stonemasonry Tool Materials

A set of tools required to keep the stonemasons of Zirgorteh the Open-armed working for many days yet.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

Plural: sets of salvaged stone supply materials
Description:
A set of materials required to salvage stone scraps into usable supplies.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

A set of supplies made from salvaged stone.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Salvaged Stone Supplies

Description:
A set of materials required to craft supplies used in mountain trail repairs.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

Description:
A set of supplies used to repair the mountain trail to Zirgorteh the Open-armed.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Trail Repair Supplies

Description:
A set of materials required to craft cookware for producing traditional Tonawawtan snacks of preserved meat and fruit.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Tonawawtan Cookware Materials

Description:
Cookware for producing traditional Tonawawtan snacks of preserved meat and fruit.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

A set of materials required to craft long-term storage supplies.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

A set of supplies for storing long-term foodstuffs in the high larder.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.
Name: Storage Supplies

Description:
A set of materials required to craft Yok Huy-sized tableware supplies.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

A set of Yok Huy-sized tableware supplies for the dining hall at Zirgorteh the Open-armed.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

Description:
A set of materials required to craft surplus shelving components.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

A set of components used in the construction of easily assembled surplus shelving for the high larder.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

Plural: sets of cropland expansion supply materials
Description:
A set of materials required to craft cropland expansion supplies.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

A set of Yok Huy-sized supplies necessary for tilling bigger and better cornfields.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

A set of materials required to craft Pelu-sized mountaineering paraphernalia.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

A set of Pelu-sized accoutrements used in mountain climbing.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

Description:
A set of materials required to craft replacement golem components.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

A replacement part newly crafted to maintain the functionality of a stone golem.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

Plural: sets of brewery maintenance supply materials
Description:
A set of materials required to craft supplies to be used in the day-to-day maintenance of the kirkahryar house.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

Description:
A set of materials required to keep the kirkahryar house spick-and-span.

※Only for use in Yok Huy society quests.

Description:
Another mystery better left unsolved.

Use item to acquire the sin beaver minion.
Name: Sin Beaver

Description: Aged liquor found in Pilgrim's Traverse.
Name: Sacramental Spirits

Description: Aromatic grounds found in Pilgrim's Traverse.
Name: Sacramental Spices

Description: Ancient meal found in Pilgrim's Traverse.
Name: Sacramental Grain

Description: Solidified wax found in Pilgrim's Traverse.
Name: Sacramental Light

Description: White flowers plucked from Pilgrim's Traverse.
Name: Sacramental Lilies

Description:
A glimmering stone irresistible to pixies.

Can be exchanged with Ose Wyd in Wolekdorf for certain items.
Name: First Light Relic

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for an allied artisan.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Top Border, Bottom Border, Accent
Name: Yok Huy Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing a portrait. Use to unlock embellishments fit for a mortal champion of Il Mheg.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Portrait Frame
Name: Pilgrim's Traverse Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing a portrait. Use to unlock embellishments fit for a pilgrim of the First Light.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Portrait Frame
Name: Distant Sanctums Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for those who have braved the wilds as an illustrious monster hunter.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Backing, Top Border, Portrait Frame, Plate Frame, Accent
Name: Hunter's Monstrous Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for those who have braved the wilds as an illustrious monster hunter.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Backing, Top Border, Portrait Frame, Plate Frame, Accent
Name: Hunter's Wild Framer's Kit

Description:
Dreams of the day it attains rugged good looks and colorful feathers.

Use item to acquire the Seikret fledgling minion.
Name: Seikret Fledgling

Description:
Rest assured it won't dump its sac of nectar on you.

Use item to acquire the Vigorwasp minion.
Name: Vigorwasp

Description:
Gazes out into eternity with eyes unblinking.

Use item to acquire the wind-up Yok Huy minion.
Name: Wind-up Yok Huy

Description:
As your lovely branch, it will lend you its strength!

Use item to acquire the wind-up Feo Ul minion.
Name: Wind-up Feo Ul

Description: Protects the bearer from rain and sun, but not from pixie mischief. Use to acquire a pixie parasol.
Name: Pixie Parasol

Description: An extravagant parasol fashioned after a creature of another world. Use to acquire a Mizutsune parasol.
Name: Mizutsune Parasol

Description: A suit of chocobo armor inspired by designs from the Church of the First Light.
Name: Pilgrim's Barding

Singular: copy of <Emphasis>Ballroom Etiquette - The Ceremony of Tea</Emphasis>
Plural: copies of <Emphasis>Ballroom Etiquette - The Ceremony of Tea</Emphasis>
Description: An illustrated manual with detailed instructions for enjoying a cup of warm green tea. Use to learn the /drinkgreentea and /savortea emotes.
Name: Ballroom Etiquette - The Ceremony of Tea

Singular: copy of <Emphasis>Modern Aesthetics - Simple and Clean</Emphasis>
Plural: copies of <Emphasis>Modern Aesthetics - Simple and Clean</Emphasis>
Description:
The realm's premier publication on beauty and fashion, this specific copy of <Emphasis>Modern Aesthetics</Emphasis> covers, in detail, techniques for achieving an eminently unfussy face-framing coiffure.

Use to unlock a new hairstyle at the aesthetician.
Name: Modern Aesthetics - Simple and Clean

Description:
This permit allows the hiring of Felyne material suppliers on the estate.

※Private chambers (apartments), cottages, houses, and mansions can host 4, 6, 8, and 10 vendors, respectively.
Name: Felyne Material Supplier Permit

Description:
This permit allows the hiring of Felyne junkmongers on the estate.

※Private chambers (apartments), cottages, houses, and mansions can host 4, 6, 8, and 10 vendors, respectively.
Name: Felyne Junkmonger Permit

Description:
This permit allows the hiring of Felyne menders on the estate.

※Private chambers (apartments), cottages, houses, and mansions can host 4, 6, 8, and 10 vendors, respectively.
Name: Felyne Mender Permit

Description:
This permit allows the hiring of Felyne servants on the estate.

※Private chambers (apartments), cottages, houses, and mansions can host 4, 6, 8, and 10 vendors, respectively.
Name: Felyne Servant Permit

Description:
An uncommon (★★) card used in the game Triple Triad.
Card No. 435
Name: Rorrlo Teh Card

Description:
An uncommon (★★) card used in the game Triple Triad.
Card No. 436
Name: Ornamental Leafman Card

Description:
A rare (★★★) card used in the game Triple Triad.
Card No. 437
Name: Fahrafahr Card

Description:
A legendary (★★★★★) card used in the game Triple Triad.
Card No. 438
Name: Dawntrail Krile Card

Description: A curved horn that, when blown, emits a stony note that summons forth Vurgar the Loyal.
Name: Vurgar the Loyal Horn

Description: A metal tuning fork that, when struck, emits a tone both derivative and flattering that calls forth your forgiven mimicry.
Name: Forgiven Mimicry Resonator

Description: This chandelier once graced the ceiling at the Church of the First Light as a furnishing. Now it can grace your feet as your ride.
Name: Chandelier of First Light

Description: This horn of bone produces a dauntless sound that calls your dependable Seikret to your side.
Name: Seikret Horn

Description: This horn of bone produces a frantic tone that brings a Felyne support team cart careening to your rescue.
Name: Felyne Support Team Cart Horn

Singular: copy of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Cat Eye Reading Glasses</Emphasis>
Plural: copies of <Emphasis>The Faces We Wear - Cat Eye Reading Glasses</Emphasis>
Description: An illustrated periodical on fashionable facial accessories, this particular issue contains a cover story on feline reading spectacles of varying colors. Use to unlock the cat eye reading glasses facewear.
Name: The Faces We Wear - Cat Eye Reading Glasses

Description: Protects the bearer from rain and sun, but not from pixie mischief. Use to acquire a blue pixie parasol.
Name: Blue Pixie Parasol

Singular: pair of sainti of the First Light
Plural: pairs of sainti of the First Light
Name: Sainti of the First Light

Singular: copy of <Emphasis>The Book of First Light</Emphasis>
Plural: copies of <Emphasis>The Book of First Light</Emphasis>
Name: The Book of First Light

Plural: pairs of daggers of the First Light
Name: Daggers of the First Light

Singular: pair of tathlums of the First Light
Plural: pairs of tathlums of the First Light
Name: Tathlums of the First Light

Singular: war scythe of the First Light
Plural: war scythes of the First Light
Name: War Scythe of the First Light

Singular: array of pendulums of the First Light
Plural: arrays of pendulums of the First Light
Name: Pendulums of the First Light

Singular: pair of twinfangs of the First Light
Plural: pairs of twinfangs of the First Light
Name: Twinfangs of the First Light

Singular: copy of <Emphasis>The Book of Sacramental Light</Emphasis>
Plural: copies of <Emphasis>The Book of Sacramental Light</Emphasis>
Name: The Book of Sacramental Light

Description:
A banded chest containing a Veldian weapon.

Required level: 100. IL: 745. Weapon type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.
Name: Veldian Weapon Coffer

Description: A sturdy grip designed for illumed aetherpool arms.
Name: Illumed Aetherpool Grip

Description: Carved from Guardian Arkveld's hide, this scale possesses a variety of unique properties and has manifold uses.
Name: Guardian Scale

Description: A certificate awarded to those who have slain a mighty wyvern.
Name: Guardian Arkveld Certificate

Description:
Grants the effect of Rehabilitation (HP regeneration) to self.

<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration:<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> 30s
※Only available for use in Pilgrim's Traverse.
Name: Pilgrim's Potion

Description: This silky bag containing a portion of the Accursed Hoard from Pilgrim's Traverse has been sealed with powerful magicks. Only an appraiser who delights in discoveries above all else might be able to undo such a seal.
Name: Sack of Silvered Light

Description: This silky bag containing a portion of the Accursed Hoard from Pilgrim's Traverse has been sealed with powerful magicks. Only an appraiser who delights in discoveries above all else might be able to undo such a seal.
Name: Sack of Gilded Light

Description: This silky bag containing a portion of the Accursed Hoard from Pilgrim's Traverse has been sealed with powerful magicks. Only an appraiser who delights in discoveries above all else might be able to undo such a seal.
Name: Sack of Platinum Light

Singular: pair of earrings of the First Light
Plural: pairs of earrings of the First Light
Name: Earrings of the First Light

Singular: pair of bangles of the First Light
Plural: pairs of bangles of the First Light
Name: Bangles of the First Light

Description: This imposing horn emits a steadfast tone that summons your pilgrim's protector.
Name: Pilgrim's Protector Horn

Description: When blown, this horn produces a pleasing sound that calls forth your ornamental shrublet.
Name: Ornamental Shrublet Horn

Description: Music roll for <Emphasis>Moment of Peace</Emphasis>. Use to add to your orchestrion list.
Name: Moment of Peace Orchestrion Roll

Description:
Viscous liquid with a distinctive and alluring aroma.

Phials can be traded for special items.
Name: Luminous Oil

Description:
A foldable seat employed by many a hunter in the field, and only in the field.

※Outdoor use only.
Name: Hunter's Camp Chair

Description:
A simple grill used by particularly ravenous hunters who crave BBQ more than they fear suffocation by meat smoke in ill-ventilated lodges.

※Up to twenty may be placed in a single estate.
Name: Indoor Hunter's Grill

Description: A foldable seat employed by many a hunter at home, where its camp-specific cousin simply will not do.
Name: Hunter's Lodge Chair

Description: This silky bag containing a portion of the Blessed Hoard from Pilgrim's Traverse has been sealed with powerful magicks. Only an appraiser who delights in discoveries above all else might be able to undo such a seal.
Name: Sack of First Light
